name: polyglot-monorepo
description: Polyglot monorepo with the 11-slot tool-belt harness wired in.

stack-manager.implementation: Stubbed Rust slot wrapper; replace with a port-allocating stack manager when the real plugin lands.

inspector.implementation: Node evidence-capture scripts with a thin bin dispatcher.

sensors.implementation: TypeScript adapter pair: dependency-cruiser 17.4.0 (Ca/Ce/I) + ts-morph 23.0.0 (Abstractness A), merged by a Node aggregator that emits per-folder and per-module Martin Ca/Ce/I/A/D where D = |A + I − 1|. Report-only; policy gate deferred until consumer forks have >= 50 workspace modules. Polyglot adapters (grimp/cargo-modules/go-arch-lint, sentrux overlay) land in later increments.

doc-validator.implementation: Stubbed bin entrypoint; replace with the Rust validator when the real plugin lands.
